details.IncidentDetail: "[17] C18-010 MOVING VEH TO THE TURN OUT NO THE BRIDGE [Shared]"
"[16] C18-010 TURN OUT NO THE BRIDGE [Shared]"
"[10] RP REQ MEDICAL - WANTS A FULL BODY SCAN OF THEIR BRAIN AND BODY "
"[7] INQ'D IF RP WAS INJ'D SHE STATED SHE BELIEVES SHE HAS A CONCUSSION, HAS TRAUMATIC BRAIN INJURY AND EMOTIONAL HARM "
"[6] NEAREST CROSS ST OLD RIVER RD "
"[4] RP ADVS THAT THERE WAS A WIND CURRENT AND IT CAUSED HER VEH TO SMASH INTO THE BRIDGE "
"[3] "WAS JUST DRIVING AROUND" - BEFORE THEY ENTERED THE BRIDGE "
"[35] LATE ENTRY - PROVIDED CELL # TO CAL FIRE HOWARD FOREST FOR DIRECT CONTACT "
"[29] INVLVD TOOK ELK MOUNTAIN RD TO THEIR CAR SITE "
"[28] ONE PERSON IS UNABLE TO SEE DUE TO THEIR INJURIES and THEY SAY WE ARE SLOWLY LOSING IT "
"[23] PRTYS ARE KINDA TRAPPED IN THEIR VEH PER RP "
"[19] VEH VS MOUNTAIN - STILL UNABLE TO OBTAIN VEH DESCR "

"[10] RP ISNT ANSWERING QUESTIONS ABT HOW MAY VEHS INVOLVED OR EXTENT OF INJS "
"[10] PER STKN FIRE // FIRE CHIEF IS 1023G W/ SUBJ"
